title: campanula rapunculoides var. trachelioides
intro: Campanula rapunculoides var. trachelioides, also known as the creeping bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The creeping bellflower is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Campanula rapunculoides var. trachelioides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
